title: Kebeney
summary: Kebeney (Russian: Кэбеней) is an extinct shield volcano located in central Sredinny Range, in the northern part of the Kamchatka Peninsula, Russia.  It is a basaltic/andesidic shield volcano with a number of cinder cones on its flanks, aligned along the Sredinny Range NE-SW axis.
text: Kebeney (Russian: Кэбеней) is an extinct shield volcano located in central Sredinny Range, in the northern part of the Kamchatka Peninsula, Russia.  It is a basaltic/andesidic shield volcano with a number of cinder cones on its flanks, aligned along the Sredinny Range NE-SW axis.
